titles.it: Responsabile - Audit ESG
titles.en: Manager - Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Audit
titles.de: Manager - Umwelt-, Sozial- und Governance (ESG) Audit
titles.fr: Responsable - Audit ESG

descriptions.it: Descrizione - Responsabile dei mandati di audit nazionali e internazionali nel campo della sostenibilità, compresa la pianificazione, il controllo e l'attuazione della strategia di audit, nonché la creazione di rapporti di audit di alta qualità. - consulenza ai clienti nel reporting della sostenibilità, realizzazione di analisi e audit Gap secondo gli standard locali e internazionali. - Una stretta collaborazione con esperti interni: donne di diverse discipline, in particolare nei settori dell'ambiente, della supply chain e dei requisiti di cura. - Partecipazione attiva e ulteriore sviluppo del portafoglio ESG-Audit in un ambiente di mercato dinamico e fortemente in crescita in diverse industrie. - Guida professionale e supporto per i membri del team e contributo per l'ulteriore sviluppo dei dipendenti. - Esperienza professionale rilevante da cinque a nove anni nell'audit, con la capacità di rispondere in modo indipendente ai mandati di audit dall'acquisizione al completamento. - Esperienza acquisita in report non finanziari, report ESG e/o audit annuale. - No. Ottima conoscenza degli standard e delle normative pertinenti per la rendicontazione della sostenibilità, ad esempio CSRD/ESRS, GRI, protocollo GHG e GRI. - Ottimo interesse e alta motivazione per la sostenibilità, il cambiamento climatico e le questioni regolamentari, nonché il piacere nei compiti di leadership e coaching. - Molto buona conoscenza del tedesco e dell'inglese in parola e scrittura.
descriptions.en: Descrizione - Head of national and international audit mandates in the field of sustainability, including planning, control and implementation of the audit strategy, as well as the creation of high-quality audit reports. - Advising customers in sustainability reporting, carrying out Gap analyses and audits according to local and international standards. - Close cooperation with internal experts: women from different disciplines, in particular in the areas of environmental, supply chain and care requirements. - Active participation and further development of the ESG-Audit portfolio in a dynamic, strongly growing market environment across different industries. - Professional guidance and support for team members and contribution to the further development of employees. - Five to nine years relevant professional experience in audit, with the ability to independently answer audit mandates from acquisition to completion. - Experience gained in non-financial reporting, ESG reporting and/or annual audit. - Very good knowledge of relevant standards and regulations for sustainability reporting, e.g. CSRD/ESRS, GRI, GHG protocol and GRI. - Excellent interest and high motivation for sustainability, climate change and regulatory issues, as well as pleasure in leadership and coaching tasks. - Very good knowledge of German and English in word and writing.
descriptions.de: Descrizione - Leitung nationaler und internationaler Prüfungsmandate im Bereich Nachhaltigkeit, inklusive Planung, Steuerung und Umsetzung der Prüfungsstrategie sowie Erstellung qualitativ hochwertiger Prüfungsberichte. - Beratung von Kund:innen bei der Nachhaltigkeitsberichterstattung, Durchführung von Gap-Analysen sowie Vorprüfungen nach lokalen und internationalen Standards. - Enge Zusammenarbeit mit internen Fachexpert:innen aus verschiedenen Disziplinen, insbesondere in den Bereichen Umwelt‑, Lieferketten‑ und Sorgfaltspflichten. - Aktive Mitgestaltung und Weiterentwicklung des ESG‑Audit‑Portfolios in einem dynamischen, stark wachsenden Marktumfeld über verschiedene Branchen hinweg. - Fachliche Anleitung und Unterstützung von Teammitgliedern sowie Beitrag zur Weiterentwicklung von Mitarbeitenden. - Fünf bis neun Jahre relevante Berufserfahrung im Audit, mit der Fähigkeit, Prüfungsmandate eigenständig von der Akquisition bis zum Abschluss zu verantworten. - Fundierte Erfahrung in der nichtfinanziellen Berichterstattung, im ESG‑Reporting und/oder in der Jahresabschlussprüfung. - Sehr gute Kenntnisse relevanter Standards und Regelwerke der Nachhaltigkeitsberichterstattung, z. B. CSRD/ESRS, GRI, GHG‑Protokoll sowie GRI. - Ausgeprägtes Interesse und hohe Motivation für Nachhaltigkeit, Klimawandel und regulatorische Fragestellungen sowie Freude an Führungs‑ und Coaching‑Aufgaben. - Sehr gute Deutsch‑ und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift.
descriptions.fr: Descrizione - Chef des mandats d'audit nationaux et internationaux dans le domaine de la durabilité, y compris la planification, le contrôle et la mise en œuvre de la stratégie d'audit, ainsi que la création de rapports d'audit de haute qualité. - Conseiller les clients dans les rapports sur la durabilité, effectuer des analyses et des audits des lacunes conformément aux normes locales et internationales. - Coopération étroite avec les experts internes : femmes de différentes disciplines, en particulier dans les domaines de l ' environnement, de la chaîne d ' approvisionnement et des soins. - Participation active et développement du portefeuille ESG-Audit dans un environnement de marché dynamique et en forte croissance dans différentes industries. - Orientation et soutien professionnels pour les membres de l'équipe et contribution au perfectionnement des employés. - De cinq à neuf ans d'expérience professionnelle pertinente en matière d'audit, avec la capacité de répondre de manière indépendante aux mandats d'audit de l'acquisition à la fin. - Expérience acquise en matière de rapports non financiers, de rapports ESG et/ou de vérification annuelle. - Oui. Très bonne connaissance des normes et des règlements pertinents pour l'établissement de rapports sur la durabilité, p. ex., CSRD/ESRS, GRI, Protocole sur les GES et GRI. - Intérêt excellent et forte motivation pour la durabilité, le changement climatique et les questions réglementaires, ainsi que plaisir dans les tâches de leadership et de coaching. - Très bonne connaissance de l'allemand et de l'anglais en paroles et en écriture.

titles.it: Tirocinante/Apprendista - Corporate Tax
titles.fr: Stage/formation - Impôt sur les sociétés

descriptions.it: Descrizione All'interno di PwC, si unirà a un team dinamico e collaborativo, specializzato nell'accompagnamento a clienti locali e internazionali su varie e stimolanti questioni fiscali. In un ambiente in continua evoluzione, contribuirai a progetti con alto valore aggiunto, sviluppando le tue competenze tecniche, digitali e relazionali insieme a professionisti esperti. # Mansioni - Consiglia le aziende a complessi aspetti fiscali, economici e legali, fornendo soluzioni innovative, tra cui l'uso di moderni strumenti tecnologici e soluzioni basate sull'intelligenza artificiale. - Guidare i nostri clienti sulla conformità fiscale, la contabilità fiscale e supportarli nella trasformazione della loro funzione fiscale, al fine di ottimizzare la gestione dei loro obblighi e sostenere l'evoluzione dei loro processi utilizzando strumenti digitali efficaci. - Lavorare su un team giovane e dinamico e partecipare alla ricerca e allo sviluppo di consulenza fiscale sotto forma di accordi fiscali, memoranda, opinioni o presentazioni ai clienti. - Collaborare efficacemente con diversi stakeholder, dimostrando forti capacità comunicative, sia per via orale che per iscritto, per trasmettere argomenti tecnici in modo chiaro, strutturato e accessibile. - No. Approfitta di eccellenti prospettive di carriera: dopo sei mesi, se ti senti a tuo agio nella posizione, potresti spostarti in una posizione di consulenza. - Ricevete un supporto personalizzato in tutto il vostro stage, arricchindo le vostre competenze tecniche attraverso la formazione continua su questioni fiscali attuali, nonché sui nuovi strumenti tecnologici offerti dai nostri manager e Associati. ## Required - Attualmente alla fine dei loro studi o tenendo un master in economia, economia aziendale o diritto, in Svizzera. - No. Avere un forte interesse per la tassazione nazionale e internazionale, così come la volontà di continuare a sviluppare le vostre competenze in questo settore. - No. Avere l'ambizione di diventare un esperto fiscale e, come tale, considerare la formazione professionale che porta al grado federale di esperti fiscali. - Dimostrare una naturale affinità con i numeri e master strumenti IT comuni come Excel e PowerPoint, pur avendo un forte interesse per gli strumenti tecnologici in generale, soluzioni digitali, intelligenza artificiale e analisi dei dati. - No. Sii confortevole con l'apprendimento e l'utilizzo di nuovi strumenti tecnologici, e avere la curiosità di capire come AI e tecnologie emergenti possono sostenere e trasformare le professioni fiscali. - Master inglese in lingua orale e scritta, oltre alla lingua madre francese. Il tedesco sarebbe un bene. - No. Avere ottime capacità di comunicazione e presentazione, con la capacità di scambiare con clienti e colleghi in modo chiaro, professionale ed efficiente. - Vuoi lavorare come team, aiutare a risolvere problemi complessi e fornire supporto di qualità ai tuoi clienti e colleghi. - Dimostrare un atteggiamento orientato al servizio, un senso naturale di iniziativa e un forte impegno per il vostro lavoro, con costante preoccupazione per fornire un lavoro di qualità eccellente. - Dimostrare una reale capacità di apprendimento, adattamento e collaborazione, sia in un ambiente di squadra che in autonomia.
descriptions.en: Descrizione Within PwC, you will join a dynamic and collaborative team, specialized in accompaniment to local and international clients on various and stimulating tax issues. In a constantly changing environment, you will contribute to projects with high added value, while developing your technical, digital and relational skills alongside experienced professionals. # Mansioni - Advise companies on complex fiscal, economic and legal aspects, providing innovative solutions, including the use of modern technological tools and artificial intelligence-based solutions. - Guide our clients on tax compliance, tax accounting, and support them in the transformation of their tax function, in order to optimize the management of their obligations and support the evolution of their processes using effective digital tools. - Work on a young and dynamic team and participate in research and the development of tax advice in the form of tax agreements, memoranda, opinions or presentations to clients. - Collaborate effectively with different stakeholders, demonstrating strong communication skills, both in the oral and in writing, in order to transmit technical topics in a clear, structured and accessible manner. - Take advantage of excellent career prospects: after six months, if you feel comfortable in the position, you could move to a consulting position. - Receive personalized support throughout your internship, while enriching your technical skills through ongoing training on current tax issues, as well as on the new technological tools offered by our Managers and Associates. ## Required - Currently at the end of their studies or holding a master's degree in economics, business administration or law, in Switzerland. - Have a strong interest in national and international taxation, as well as the willingness to continue to develop your skills in this area. - Have the ambition to become a tax expert and, as such, consider vocational training leading to the federal degree of tax expert. - Demonstrate a natural affinity with numbers and master common IT tools such as Excel and PowerPoint, while having a strong interest in technology tools in general, digital solutions, artificial intelligence and data analysis. - Be comfortable with learning and using new technological tools, and have the curiosity to understand how AI and emerging technologies can support and transform tax professions. - Master English in oral and written language, in addition to your French mother tongue. German would be an asset. - Have very good communication and presentation skills, with the ability to exchange clearly, professionally and efficiently with clients and colleagues. - Want to work as a team, help solve complex issues and provide quality support to your clients and colleagues. - Demonstrate a service-oriented attitude, a natural sense of initiative and a strong commitment to your work, with constant concern to provide excellent quality work. - Demonstrate a real capacity for learning, adaptation and collaboration, both in a team environment and in autonomy.
descriptions.de: In PwC werden Sie sich einem dynamischen und kollaborativen Team anschließen, das sich auf die Begleitung lokaler und internationaler Kunden zu verschiedenen und anregenden Steuerfragen spezialisiert hat. In einer sich ständig verändernden Umgebung tragen Sie zu Projekten mit hohem Mehrwert bei und entwickeln Ihre technischen, digitalen und relationalen Fähigkeiten zusammen mit erfahrenen Fachleuten. # Mansioni - Beratung von Unternehmen zu komplexen steuerlichen, wirtschaftlichen und rechtlichen Aspekten, Bereitstellung innovativer Lösungen, einschließlich der Verwendung moderner technologischer Werkzeuge und künstlicher Intelligenz-basierte Lösungen. - Führen Sie unsere Kunden auf Steuerkonformität, Steuerrechnung und unterstützen Sie sie bei der Umwandlung ihrer Steuerfunktion, um das Management ihrer Verpflichtungen zu optimieren und die Entwicklung ihrer Prozesse mit effektiven digitalen Werkzeugen zu unterstützen. - Arbeiten Sie an einem jungen und dynamischen Team und nehmen Sie an der Forschung und Entwicklung von Steuerberatung in Form von Steuervereinbarungen, Memorandum, Meinungen oder Präsentationen an Kunden teil. - Mit verschiedenen Stakeholdern effektiv zusammenarbeiten und starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten zeigen, sowohl oral als auch schriftlich, um technische Themen klar, strukturiert und zugänglich zu übermitteln. - Ja. Profitieren Sie von exzellenten Karriereaussichten: Nach sechs Monaten, wenn Sie sich in der Position wohl fühlen, können Sie sich in eine Beratungsposition bewegen. - Erhalten Sie personalisierte Unterstützung während Ihres Praktikums und bereichern Sie Ihre technischen Fähigkeiten durch laufende Schulungen zu aktuellen Steuerfragen sowie zu den neuen technologischen Werkzeugen unserer Manager und Mitarbeiter. Erforderlich - Gegenwärtig am Ende ihres Studiums oder in der Schweiz. - Ja. Haben Sie ein starkes Interesse an der nationalen und internationalen Besteuerung sowie die Bereitschaft, Ihre Fähigkeiten in diesem Bereich weiter zu entwickeln. - Ja. Bemühen Sie sich, ein Steuerexperte zu werden und als solche die berufliche Ausbildung zu betrachten, die zum Bundesfach der Steuerexperte führt. - Demonstrieren Sie eine natürliche Affinität mit Zahlen und meistern Sie gemeinsame IT-Tools wie Excel und PowerPoint, während ein starkes Interesse an Technologie-Tools im Allgemeinen, digitale Lösungen, künstliche Intelligenz und Datenanalyse. - Ja. Seien Sie bequem mit dem Lernen und der Nutzung neuer technologischer Tools und haben die Neugier, um zu verstehen, wie KI- und Schwellentechnologien Steuerberufe unterstützen und transformieren können. - Master Englisch in mündlicher und schriftlicher Sprache, zusätzlich zu Ihrer französischen Muttersprache. Deutsch wäre ein Vermögenswert. - Ja. Haben Sie sehr gute Kommunikations- und Präsentationsfähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, mit Kunden und Kollegen klar, professionell und effizient auszutauschen. - Sie wollen als Team arbeiten, komplexe Probleme lösen und Ihren Kunden und Kollegen qualitativ hochwertige Unterstützung bieten. - Demonstrieren Sie eine serviceorientierte Einstellung, ein natürliches Initiativgefühl und ein starkes Engagement für Ihre Arbeit, mit ständiger Sorge, hervorragende Qualität Arbeit zu bieten. - Demonstrieren Sie eine echte Fähigkeit zum Lernen, Anpassung und Zusammenarbeit, sowohl in einem Team-Umfeld als auch in Autonomie.
descriptions.fr: ## Descrizione Au sein de PwC, tu rejoindras une équipe dynamique et collaborative, spécialisée dans l'accompagnement de clients locaux et internationaux sur des problématiques fiscales variées et stimulantes. Dans un environnement en constante évolution, tu contribueras à des projets à forte valeur ajoutée, tout en développant tes compétences techniques, digitales et relationnelles aux côtés de professionnels expérimentés. ## Mansioni - Conseiller les entreprises sur des aspects fiscaux, économiques et juridiques complexes, en leur apportant des solutions innovantes, notamment grâce à l'utilisation d'outils technologiques modernes et de solutions basées sur l'intelligence artificielle. - Guider nos clients en matière de conformité fiscale, de comptabilité fiscale, et les accompagner dans la transformation de leur fonction fiscale, afin d'optimiser la gestion de leurs obligations et de soutenir l'évolution de leurs processus à l'aide d'outils digitaux performants. - Travailler au sein d'une équipe jeune et dynamique, et participer à la recherche ainsi qu'à l'élaboration de conseils fiscaux sous forme d'accords fiscaux, de mémorandums, d'opinions ou de présentations destinées aux clients. - Collaborer efficacement avec différentes parties prenantes, en faisant preuve de solides compétences en communication, tant à l'oral qu'à l'écrit, afin de transmettre des sujets techniques de manière claire, structurée et accessible. - Profiter d'excellentes perspectives de carrière : après six mois, si tu te sens à l'aise dans la fonction, tu pourrais évoluer vers un poste de consultant. - Recevoir un accompagnement personnalisé tout au long de ton stage, tout en enrichissant tes compétences techniques via des formations continues sur des sujets fiscaux actuels, ainsi que sur les nouveaux outils technologiques, proposées par nos Managers et Associés. ## Requisiti - Actuellement en fin d'études ou titulaire d'une maîtrise universitaire en sciences économiques, business administration ou droit, en Suisse. - Posséder un intérêt marqué pour la fiscalité nationale et internationale, ainsi que la volonté de continuer à approfondir tes compétences dans ce domaine. - Avoir l'ambition de devenir un expert fiscal et, à ce titre, envisager une formation professionnelle menant à l'obtention du diplôme fédéral d'expert fiscal. - Faire preuve d'une affinité naturelle avec les chiffres et maîtriser les outils informatiques usuels tels qu'Excel et PowerPoint, tout en ayant un intérêt prononcé pour les outils technologiques en général, les solutions digitales, l'intelligence artificielle et l'analyse de données. - Être à l'aise avec l'apprentissage et l'utilisation de nouveaux outils technologiques, et avoir la curiosité de comprendre comment l'IA et les technologies émergentes peuvent soutenir et transformer les métiers de la fiscalité. - Maîtriser l'anglais à l'oral et à l'écrit, en plus de ta langue maternelle française. L'allemand constituerait un atout. - Disposer de très bonnes compétences en communication et de présentation, avec la capacité d'échanger de manière claire, professionnelle et efficace avec les clients comme avec les collègues. - Avoir envie de travailler en équipe, de contribuer à la résolution de dossiers complexes et d'apporter un soutien de qualité à tes clients et à tes collègues. - Faire preuve d'une attitude orientée service, d'un sens naturel de l'initiative et d'un fort engagement dans ton travail, avec le souci constant de fournir un travail d'excellente qualité. - Démontrer une réelle capacité d'apprentissage, d'adaptation et de collaboration, aussi bien dans un environnement d'équipe qu'en autonomie.

titles.it: Direttore CIO Advisory Middle Markets
titles.fr: Director CIO Advisory Middle Markets

descriptions.it:
PwC Consulting has a strong foundation of clients in the middle market and family business sectors. In addition to serving large multinational corporations, we aim to further strengthen our presence in the second and third tier client segments.
To support this goal, we are seeking a Director / Partner specializing in Technology Strategy & Transformation / CIO Advisory .

• Lead and support exciting technology strategy and transformation projects for our clients in the middle markets sector. 

• Work closely with executives in the technology environment and develop digital strategies as well as effective business models. 

• Develop creative, high-quality solutions to current challenges of our clients in the key areas of technology strategy, organization, operating-model, assessment and other related topics. 

• Actively drive the acquisition of new projects and clients. 

• Be involved in the further development of the service offering for Technology Strategy & Transformation Advisory. 

• Work in an inspiring team and an international network, receive regular feedback from colleagues and superiors and have access to first-class training in the areas of technical know-how and soft skills.

• Take responsibility for employees in the role of coach and accompany your coachees in their professional and career development.

• Successful career in consulting and excellent methodological and technical skills. 

• Scientific and/or technical background or in economics and experience in leading and supporting strategic technology or transformation projects. 

• Able to quickly grasp complex scenarios and interrelationships and address them with solution-oriented and entrepreneurial thinking. 

• Proven expertise in common methodologies and frameworks (TOGAF, COBIT, SAFe, IPMA, PRINCE, SCRUM, etc.). 

• Interest in the further development of the team and the expansion of the service offering and show initiative to shape them both. 

• Experience in leadership and/or coaching of employees. 

• Convincing appearance and excellent communication skills, which makes you a competent conversation partner for our clients. 

• Very good oral and written skills in German and English, preferably also in French. 

• Committed, communicative personality with high flexibility and resilience, you like to work in teams but also independently and at changing locations.

titles.it: Manager/Senior Manager - Senior Cyber Security Architetto
titles.en: Manager/Senior Manager - Senior Cyber Security Architect
titles.de: Manager/Senior Manager - Senior Cyber Security Architect
titles.fr: Manager/Senior Manager - Senior Cyber Security Architecte

descriptions.it:
Are you eager to make a mark in the market as a knowledgeable and influential figure in cyber security architecture and solutions in the areas such as Cloud, OT, Zero Trust, Data & Network? Look no further because you have found your place. Join our team and support our Cybersecurity unit in evolving our cyber transformation practice.
As part of our global network, you will have the opportunity to collaborate with diverse and compelling teams, where your proactive and forward-thinking mindset will be highly valued and encouraged.

• Join our diverse Cybersecurity team and collaborate within our global community of experts to guide the design and implementation of comprehensive cybersecurity architectures for clients.

• You will be responsible for designing and delivering robust, scalable, and future-proof security architectures for our diverse client base

• Act as the lead security architect on projects, providing expert guidance and industry good practices. Example areas would be Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Cryptography.

• Assess client cybersecurity posture and provide strategic recommendations aligned with industry best practices and regulatory requirements

• You will be a key role in large scale business and cyber transformation programs. You will also collaborate closely with client IT, risk, and compliance teams to integrate security solutions into business processes

• Conduct security risk assessments and threat modeling to guide architecture decisions.

• Participate in proposals, client presentations, and workshops to communicate complex security concepts clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

• Cultivate a client network, establishing yourself as the go-to person on security needs within PwC.

• Coach and develop your team members on their career path, while contributing to the overall team growth strategy.

• At least 8+ years of experience in Information Security architecture with at least 4 years dedicated to security architecture. Additionally, well conversent in Cloud, Network, Zero Trust, Data Protection, or any related domains.

• Hold a bachelor's or master's degree in IT, Business IT or a related field. Information Security certifications such as CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF, or CCSP are highly desirable

• Experience with DevSecOps practices , and implementation of security tools is a strong plus.

• Good mentorship and team-building skills.

• Ability to communicate complex security concepts in busines context to a broad range of audiences.

• Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage executive-level stakeholders.

• Analytical mindset and problem-solving skills with attention to detail

• Fluent in English; German or French are a plus.
descriptions.en:
Are you eager to make a mark in the market as a knowledgeable and influential figure in cyber security architecture and solutions in the areas such as Cloud, OT, Zero Trust, Data & Network? Look no further because you have found your place. Join our team and support our Cybersecurity unit in evolving our cyber transformation practice.
As part of our global network, you will have the opportunity to collaborate with diverse and compelling teams, where your proactive and forward-thinking mindset will be highly valued and encouraged.

• Join our diverse Cybersecurity team and collaborate within our global community of experts to guide the design and implementation of comprehensive cybersecurity architectures for clients.

• You will be responsible for designing and delivering robust, scalable, and future-proof security architectures for our diverse client base

• Act as the lead security architect on projects, providing expert guidance and industry good practices. Example areas would be Zero Trust, Network, OT, Data & Cloud, Cryptography.

• Assess client cybersecurity posture and provide strategic recommendations aligned with industry best practices and regulatory requirements

• You will be a key role in large scale business and cyber transformation programs. You will also collaborate closely with client IT, risk, and compliance teams to integrate security solutions into business processes

• Conduct security risk assessments and threat modeling to guide architecture decisions.

• Participate in proposals, client presentations, and workshops to communicate complex security concepts clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

• Cultivate a client network, establishing yourself as the go-to person on security needs within PwC.

• Coach and develop your team members on their career path, while contributing to the overall team growth strategy.

• At least 8+ years of experience in Information Security architecture with at least 4 years dedicated to security architecture. Additionally, well conversent in Cloud, Network, Zero Trust, Data Protection, or any related domains.

• Hold a bachelor's or master's degree in IT, Business IT or a related field. Information Security certifications such as CISSP, SABSA, CISM, TOGAF, or CCSP are highly desirable

• Experience with DevSecOps practices , and implementation of security tools is a strong plus.

• Good mentorship and team-building skills.

• Ability to communicate complex security concepts in busines context to a broad range of audiences.

• Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage executive-level stakeholders.

• Analytical mindset and problem-solving skills with attention to detail

• Fluent in English; German or French are a plus.

titles.it: Senior Associate - Centro di Conformità (Spezialist/in Steuerdeklarationen)
titles.fr: Associé principal - Centre de conformité (Spézaliste/dans Steuerdeklarationen)

descriptions.it: Descrizione Entrate a far parte del nostro team di compliance ai taxi aziendali a Basilea all'interno di Tax, Legal and Workforce. Il nostro team combina un buon know-how fiscale con un approccio pragmatico alla soluzione e lavora a stretto contatto con altri specialisti del PwC: in settori come le offerte, il legale e la contabilità. Un ambiente collegiale con brevi processi decisionali, alta qualità professionale e una forte cultura di coaching e feedback vi aspetta, in cui i profili esperti possono contribuire e sviluppare la loro esperienza in modo mirato. ## Mansioni - Responsabilità per la creazione e la revisione dei rendimenti fiscali, nonché la valutazione delle implicazioni fiscali delle persone giuridiche. - ruolo attivo nella pianificazione finale fiscale, compreso il calcolo e la valutazione delle disposizioni fiscali. - elaborazione indipendente di domande complesse nel campo della fiscalità aziendale e della conformità fiscale. - Cooperazione professionale in strutture aziendali, riorganizzazione, operazioni e progetti di pianificazione fiscale. - Garantire un'alta qualità, tempestiva e regolare conformità fiscale con la legislazione vigente. - Una stretta collaborazione con gli stakeholder interni ed esterni e un supporto tecnico puntuale per i membri del team meno esperti. ## Requisiti - Formazione completa nel settore fiscale (ad esempio fiducia, università, università) o formazione commerciale di base con formazione sonora. - +Ca. 5 anni di esperienza pratica nella dichiarazione fiscale e nel rispetto fiscale delle persone giuridiche, preferibilmente in una consulenza, fiducia o ambiente industriale. - No. Molto buona conoscenza del tedesco e molto buona conoscenza dell'inglese in parola e scrittura. - No. Ottima comprensione delle relazioni fiscali e la capacità di analizzare i problemi complessi in modo strutturato e di implementarli pragmaticamente. - No. Alta auto-responsabilità, consapevolezza della qualità e avvenimento sicuro verso i clienti e le autorità fiscali. - Conoscenza di MS Office molto buona; Esperienza con software di controllo e processi di conformità digitale di vantaggio.
descriptions.en: Descrizione You become part of our corporate taxi compliance team in Basel within Tax, Legal and Workforce. Our team combines sound fiscal know-how with a pragmatic approach to the solution and works closely with other PwC specialists: in areas such as deals, legal and accounting. A collegial environment with short decision-making, high professional quality and a strong coaching and feedback culture awaits you, in which experienced profiles can contribute and develop their expertise in a targeted manner. ## Mansioni - Responsibility for the creation and review of tax returns, as well as the assessment of tax implications of legal persons. - Active role in fiscal final planning, including calculation and assessment of tax provisions. - independent processing of complex questions in the field of corporate tax and tax compliance. - Professional cooperation in corporate structures, reorganisations, transactions and tax planning projects. - Ensuring a high-quality, timely and regular tax compliance with current legislation. - Close cooperation with internal and external stakeholders as well as punctual technical support for less experienced team members. ## Requisiti - Completed training in the tax sector (e.g. trust, university, university) or basic commercial training with sound training. - +Ca. 5 years of practical experience in the tax declaration and tax compliance of legal persons, preferably in a consulting, trust or industrial environment. - Very good knowledge of German and very good knowledge of English in word and writing. - Very good understanding of tax relationships as well as ability to analyze complex issues in a structured manner and to implement them pragmatically. - High self-responsibility, quality awareness and safe occurrence towards customers and tax authorities. - Very good MS Office knowledge; Experience with control software and digital compliance processes of advantage.
descriptions.de: ## Descrizione Du wirst Teil unseres Corporate-Tax-Compliance-Teams in Basel innerhalb von Tax, Legal and Workforce. Unser Team verbindet fundiertes steuertechnisches Know-how mit einem pragmatischen Lösungsansatz und arbeitet eng mit anderen PwC Spezialist:innen aus Bereichen wie Deals, Legal und Accounting zusammen. Dich erwartet ein kollegiales Umfeld mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen, hoher fachlicher Qualität und einer ausgeprägten Coaching- und Feedbackkultur, in dem auch erfahrene Profile ihre Expertise gezielt einbringen und weiterentwickeln können. ## Mansioni - Verantwortung für die Erstellung und Review von Steuererklärungen, sowie die Beurteilung von Steuerveranlagungen von juristischen Personen. - Aktive Rolle in der steuerlichen Abschlussplanung, inklusive Berechnung und Beurteilung von Steuerrückstellungen. - Eigenständige Bearbeitung komplexer Fragestellungen im Bereich Corporate Tax und Steuer-Compliance. - Fachliche Mitarbeit bei Unternehmensstrukturierungen, Reorganisationen, Transaktionen und Steuerplanungsprojekten. - Sicherstellung einer qualitativ hochwertigen, fristgerechten und regelkonformen Steuer-Compliance unter Berücksichtigung der aktuellen Gesetzgebung. - Enge Zusammenarbeit mit internen und externen Stakeholdern sowie punktuelle fachliche Unterstützung weniger erfahrener Teammitglieder. ## Requisiti - Abgeschlossene Ausbildung im Steuerbereich (z. B. Treuhand, Fachhochschule, Universität) oder kaufmännische Grundausbildung mit fundierter Weiterbildung. - +Ca. 5 Jahre praktische Erfahrung in der Steuerdeklaration undim Bereich Steuer-Compliance von juristischen Personen, vorzugsweise in einem Beratungs-, Treuhand- oder Industrieumfeld. - Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse sowie sehr gute Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift. - Sehr gutes Verständnis steuerlicher Zusammenhänge sowie Fähigkeit, komplexe Sachverhalte strukturiert zu analysieren und pragmatisch umzusetzen. - Hohe Eigenverantwortung, Qualitätsbewusstsein und sicheres Auftreten gegenüber Kund:innen und Steuerbehörden. - Sehr gute MS Office Kenntnisse; Erfahrung mit Steuersoftware und digitalen Compliance Prozessen von Vorteil.
descriptions.fr: Descrizione Vous devenez membre de notre équipe de conformité des taxis d'entreprise à Bâle au sein de Tax, Legal et Workforce. Notre équipe combine un solide savoir-faire fiscal avec une approche pragmatique de la solution et travaille en étroite collaboration avec d'autres spécialistes PwC : dans des domaines tels que les transactions, le droit et la comptabilité. Un environnement collégial avec une courte prise de décision, une qualité professionnelle élevée et une solide culture de coaching et de rétroaction vous attendent, dans lequel des profils expérimentés peuvent contribuer et développer leur expertise de manière ciblée. ## Mansioni - Responsabilité de la création et de l'examen des déclarations de revenus, ainsi que de l'évaluation des incidences fiscales des personnes morales. - Rôle actif dans la planification financière finale, y compris le calcul et l'évaluation des dispositions fiscales. - traitement indépendant de questions complexes dans le domaine de l'impôt sur les sociétés et de la conformité fiscale. - Coopération professionnelle dans les structures d'entreprise, les réorganisations, les transactions et les projets de planification fiscale. - Assurer une conformité fiscale de haute qualité, opportune et régulière avec la législation actuelle. - Une coopération étroite avec les acteurs internes et externes ainsi qu'un soutien technique ponctuel pour les membres moins expérimentés de l'équipe. ## Requisiti - Formation complète dans le secteur fiscal (p. ex. fiducie, université, université) ou formation commerciale de base avec une formation solide. - +Ca. 5 ans d'expérience pratique dans la déclaration fiscale et la conformité fiscale des personnes morales, de préférence dans un environnement de consultation, de confiance ou industriel. - Oui. Très bonne connaissance de l'allemand et très bonne connaissance de l'anglais en paroles et en écriture. - Oui. Très bonne compréhension des relations fiscales ainsi que la capacité d'analyser les questions complexes de manière structurée et de les mettre en oeuvre de façon pragmatique. - Oui. Haute responsabilité, sensibilisation à la qualité et sécurité envers les clients et les autorités fiscales. - Très bonne connaissance MS Office; Expérience avec les logiciels de contrôle et les processus de conformité numérique d'avantage.

titles.fr: Associate - Centre de conformité (Spezialist/in Steuerdeklarationen)

Il nostro team combina un sano know-how fiscale con un approccio pragmatico alla soluzione e lavora a stretto contatto con altri specialisti PwC: sia in settori come le offerte, legali e contabili. Un ambiente collegiale con brevi processi decisionali, alta qualità professionale e una forte cultura di coaching e feedback vi aspetta, in cui i profili esperti possono contribuire e sviluppare la loro esperienza in modo mirato. - Creare e rivedere rendimenti fiscali e oneri fiscali per le persone giuridiche. - Accompagnate la pianificazione finale delle imprese e calcolate le disposizioni fiscali necessarie. - Richieste fiscali. - Supporto per progetti di strutturazione aziendale, operazioni e pianificazione fiscale. - acquisire know-how tecnico completo e competenze morbide attraverso allenamenti on-and-off-the-job. - Lavorare in un team ispiratore e affinare il tuo profilo personale e professionale attraverso un feedback regolare da colleghi e supervisori. ## Requisiti - Avere una formazione nel campo della tassazione o una formazione commerciale completa con esperienza o cercare rientro nell'area fiscale per le persone giuridiche. - No. Sii una persona altamente motivata, dinamica e mirata che apprezza il lavoro analitico e non si allontana da questioni complesse. - Mostra alta disponibilità di apprendimento e avere un tocco pronunciato per i numeri. - No. Prendere la responsabilità dall'inizio e muoversi in un ambiente con coaching attivo e cultura feedback. - Creare eccellenti competenze informatiche in Word, Excel e PowerPoint. - No. Siate stilistici in tedesco e hanno ottime competenze in inglese.
descriptions.en: Descrizione You become part of our corporate taxi compliance team in Basel within Tax, Legal and Workforce. Our team combines sound fiscal know-how with a pragmatic approach to the solution and works closely with other PwC specialists: both in areas such as deals, legal and accounting. A collegial environment with short decision-making, high professional quality and a strong coaching and feedback culture awaits you, in which experienced profiles can contribute and develop their expertise in a targeted manner. - Create and review profit tax returns and tax charges for legal persons. - Accompany the final planning of companies and calculate the required tax provisions. - Work tax enquiries. - Support for corporate structuring, transactions and tax planning projects. - acquire comprehensive technical know-how and soft skills through on-and-off-the-job trainings. - Work in an inspiring team and sharpen your personal and professional profile through regular feedback from colleagues and supervisors. ## Requisiti - Have a training in the field of taxation or a completed basic commercial training with experience or seek re-entry in the tax area for legal persons. - Be a highly motivated, dynamic and targeted person who appreciates analytical work and does not shy away from complex issues. - Show high learning readiness and have a pronounced flair for numbers. - Take responsibility from the start and move in an environment with active coaching and feedback culture. - Create excellent computer skills in Word, Excel and PowerPoint. - Be stylistic in German and have very good English skills.

Unser Team verbindet fundiertes steuertechnisches Know-how mit einem pragmatischen Lösungsansatz und arbeitet eng mit anderen PwC-Spezialist:innen aus Bereichen wie Deals, Legal und Accounting zusammen. Dich erwartet ein kollegiales Umfeld mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen, hoher fachlicher Qualität und einer ausgeprägten Coaching- und Feedbackkultur, in dem auch erfahrene Profile ihre Expertise gezielt einbringen und weiterentwickeln können. - Erstelle und überprüfe Gewinnsteuererklärungen und Steuerveranlagungen für juristische Personen. - Begleite die Abschlussplanung von Unternehmen und berechne dabei die erforderlichen Steuerrückstellungen. - Bearbeite steuerliche Anfragen. - Unterstütze bei Unternehmensstrukturierungen, Transaktionen und Steuerplanungsprojekten. - Erwerbe umfassendes technisches Know-how und Soft Skills durch On-and-off-the-job-Trainings. - Arbeite in einem inspirierenden Team und schärfe dein persönliches und berufliches Profil durch regelmässiges Feedback von Kolleg:innen und Vorgesetzten. ## Requisiti - Habe eine Ausbildung im Bereich Steuern oder eine abgeschlossene kaufmännische Grundausbildung mit Erfahrung oder suche den Wiedereinstieg im Steuerbereich für juristische Personen. - Sei eine hoch motivierte, dynamische und zielstrebige Persönlichkeit, die analytisches Arbeiten schätzt und sich nicht vor komplexen Fragestellungen scheut. - Zeige hohe Lernbereitschaft und habe ein ausgeprägtes Flair für Zahlen. - Übernehme von Anfang an Verantwortung und bewege dich in einem Umfeld mit aktiver Coaching- und Feedbackkultur. - Weise ausgezeichnete EDV-Kenntnisse in Word, Excel und PowerPoint auf. - Sei stilsicher in Deutsch und habe sehr gute Englischkenntnisse.
